nodes.label: index.html
nodes.summary: Root HTML document for Gestor Financeiro PWA — privacy-first offline financial manager (LGPD compliant). Loads CSS tokens, base, app styles and ES module app.js; declares all UI sections, drawers and dialogs.

nodes.label: <head>
nodes.summary: Head element with charset, viewport, theme-color, PWA metas, CSP, Google Fonts links and local CSS stylesheet links.

nodes.label: Content-Security-Policy meta
nodes.summary: CSP blocking external connections (connect-src none); allows self + unsafe-inline scripts, self + Google Fonts styles/fonts, self + data/blob images, blob workers, no objects. Enforces LGPD local-only data.

nodes.label: site.webmanifest
nodes.summary: PWA manifest link.

nodes.label: assets/icon-192.png
nodes.summary: PNG favicon and apple-touch-icon.

nodes.label: inline base64 favicon
nodes.summary: Inline base64-encoded PNG favicon.

nodes.label: Google Fonts Inter
nodes.summary: Inter font family (400-700) loaded from Google Fonts CDN.

nodes.label: Google Fonts DM Mono
nodes.summary: DM Mono font family (400-500) loaded from Google Fonts CDN for numeric displays.

nodes.label: css/tokens.css
nodes.summary: Design tokens stylesheet (colors, spacing, typography variables).

nodes.label: css/base.css
nodes.summary: Base reset/layout stylesheet.

nodes.label: css/app.css
nodes.summary: Application component styles.

nodes.label: src/app.js
nodes.summary: Bootstrap ES module entry point for vanilla JS application logic.

nodes.label: <body>
nodes.summary: Body containing app shell, pages, drawers, dialogs and script bootstrap.

nodes.label: #toastContainer
nodes.summary: ARIA live region for transient toast notifications.

nodes.label: #lgpdBanner
nodes.summary: LGPD privacy banner with accept and details buttons; explains local-only IndexedDB storage and LGPD rights.

nodes.label: .app-shell
nodes.summary: Main application shell container holding header, nav and content.

nodes.label: .top-header
nodes.summary: Mobile-only top header with brand and month navigation (prev/next month buttons).

nodes.label: .bottom-nav
nodes.summary: Bottom/side navigation with buttons for dashboard, transacoes, objetivos, dividas, config pages.

nodes.label: nav item: dashboard
nodes.summary: Navigation button with data-page=dashboard.

nodes.label: nav item: transacoes
nodes.summary: Navigation button with data-page=transacoes.

nodes.label: nav item: objetivos
nodes.summary: Navigation button with data-page=objetivos.

nodes.label: nav item: dividas
nodes.summary: Navigation button with data-page=dividas.

nodes.label: nav item: config
nodes.summary: Navigation button with data-page=config.

nodes.label: #mainContent
nodes.summary: Main content region hosting all page sections.

nodes.label: #page-dashboard
nodes.summary: Dashboard page: balance hero, donut chart card, categories breakdown, recent transactions list.

nodes.label: #balanceHero
nodes.summary: Balance hero displaying saldo disponível plus income/expense stats.

nodes.label: #donutCard
nodes.summary: Card with donut chart wrap and legend for monthly distribution.

nodes.label: #categoriesBreakdown
nodes.summary: Card listing spending breakdown by category.

nodes.label: #recentTxCard
nodes.summary: Card with list of recent transactions.

nodes.label: #page-transacoes
nodes.summary: Transactions page: filter chips (all/receita/despesa) and full transactions list.

nodes.label: #txFilters
nodes.summary: Transaction filter chips with data-filter-type attributes.

nodes.label: #page-objetivos
nodes.summary: Goals page with add-goal button and goals list container.

nodes.label: #page-dividas
nodes.summary: Debts page with add-debt button, tab bar (devo / me_devem) and debts list.

nodes.label: #page-config
nodes.summary: Settings page: appearance theme toggle, backup export/import/share, data & privacy clear-data, version footer.

nodes.label: .theme-toggle-group
nodes.summary: Theme selector buttons: dark, auto, light.

nodes.label: .backup-actions
nodes.summary: Backup controls: export JSON, share, import JSON (hidden file input).

nodes.label: #clearDataBtn
nodes.summary: Danger button to erase all local data (LGPD right to erasure).

nodes.label: #fabBtn
nodes.summary: Floating action button to add a transaction.

nodes.label: #confirmDialog
nodes.summary: Generic confirmation alert dialog with confirm/cancel actions.

nodes.label: #txOverlay
nodes.summary: New transaction drawer with type toggle, amount, description, category, payment method, installment fields, date.

nodes.label: #goalOverlay
nodes.summary: New goal drawer with name, target amount, deadline fields.

nodes.label: #debtOverlay
nodes.summary: New debt drawer with type toggle (devo/me_devem), description, total, paid, due date.

nodes.label: #goalActionOverlay
nodes.summary: Goal aporte/resgate drawer with hidden id/type and amount input.

nodes.label: #editGoalOverlay
nodes.summary: Edit goal drawer: name, target, current, deadline fields.

nodes.label: #editDebtOverlay
nodes.summary: Edit debt drawer: type toggle, description, total, paid, due date.

nodes.label: #editTxOverlay
nodes.summary: Edit transaction drawer: type toggle, amount, description, category, payment, date; includes linked badge placeholder.

nodes.label: assets/VFIcon.png
nodes.summary: Brand icon used in top header and desktop brand.

nodes.label: assets/VFLogo.png
nodes.summary: Logo image displayed on config page.
